pipeline.title: Voyage Shopify integration (Admin API)
pipeline.summary: Custom MCP server (voyage) talks to Voyage's Shopify Admin GraphQL. Recent-orders, orders-by-day, recent-customers, plus the 5-sales-90d guardrail used by every write operation.

pipeline.title: Daily rotating SEO audit
pipeline.summary: Scans 100 products/day. Flags missing meta description, title length issues, alt-text gaps, $0 prices, placeholders. Honours the 5-sales-90d no-touch rule.

pipeline.title: Daily catalog hygiene + sitemap diff
pipeline.summary: Compares today's product sitemap to yesterday's. Flags adds, removes, URL changes. Spot-checks 20 random products via the Shopify .json endpoint for $0/no-images/placeholders.

pipeline.title: Daily Google indexation tracker
pipeline.summary: Records sitemap product count + (when scraping isn't blocked) Google site: indexed count + delta vs yesterday. Long-term: swap to Search Console API for accuracy.

pipeline.title: Voyage daily blog · 3-day pipeline
pipeline.summary: Day 1 picks topic + outline. Day 2 writes the 1000w article as a Shopify DRAFT. Day 3 auto-publishes live unless you've deleted the draft. Rotates 7 categories weekly. Friendly-expert blog voice.

pipeline.title: Voyage social media · FB + IG
pipeline.summary: Daily product post (11:00 AEST), Sunday weekly deals carousel, Tue+Fri educational/how-to. Aussie casual tone with emoji. Posts to Voyage FB Page + @voyagecollectionaustralia IG.

pipeline.title: Shopify token auto-refresh (Voyage + Gifts Hub)
pipeline.summary: Windows scheduled task runs daily at 06:00 AEST. Re-runs OAuth client_credentials, updates wrappers for both stores, restarts the gateway so MCP servers pick up the new tokens.

pipeline.title: Gifts Hub Shopify integration
pipeline.summary: Custom MCP server (giftshub-plus) for Gifts Hub Shopify analytics. Recent-orders / orders-by-day / recent-customers via Admin GraphQL.

pipeline.title: Daily Jim Rohn quote · Telegram
pipeline.summary: 8:00 AEST daily. Agent fetches a Jim Rohn quote and delivers it to your Telegram chat.

pipeline.title: Weekly content pack · Voyage + Gifts Hub
pipeline.summary: Mon 06:00 AEST. Orchestrator runs 4 sequential agent stages: Voyage blog, Gifts Hub blog, SEO fixes, summary. Output to private repo voyage-content-pack. Priority products: marble + chest, in-stock only.

pipeline.title: This dashboard
pipeline.summary: Public PWA at farhaadbaig89-sys.github.io/voyage-ops. Auto-refreshes every 30s, regenerated locally + git-pushed every 5 min.

suggestions.title: Migrate Gifts Hub to socials
suggestions.body: Same Meta app already covers the Gifts Hub Australia FB page (id 111527618129227) + IG (id 17841466209335238). Cloning the socials pipeline for Gifts Hub is mostly a config change — no new approvals needed.

suggestions.title: Search Console API for accurate ranks
suggestions.body: Public Google `site:` scraping is unreliable (bot detection). Hooking up GSC API gives true indexed-page count, top queries, average position, click-through rate. ~30 min setup once you grant the OAuth.

suggestions.title: TikTok Content Posting API
suggestions.body: Requires a TikTok for Developers app + content-review approval (multi-day). Once unlocked, reuses the same product-of-the-day pipeline with short video.

suggestions.title: Real Reels via ffmpeg pipeline
suggestions.body: I can build a slideshow generator (Ken Burns pan, text overlays, royalty-free background music) on the local machine. Output is decent "Etsy-ish" quality — good for early growth, swap for paid video API later.

suggestions.title: Comment alert → Telegram
suggestions.body: Stream new FB Page + IG comments to your Telegram so you can reply personally. Higher engagement than auto-replies.

suggestions.title: SEO auto-fix mode
suggestions.body: The audit currently reports issues only. Once we've watched a few cycles, flip on auto-fix for guardrail-passing products: write meta descriptions, fix title length, add image alt-text. Reversible if anything misfires.

suggestions.title: Price-drop history tracker
suggestions.body: Daily snapshot of top-200 product prices. Detect drops, surface to the deals roundup with "was X, now Y" + true delta.

suggestions.title: UGC reposting workflow
suggestions.body: When a customer tags @voyagecollectionaustralia, alert me — I draft a repost for your approval.

suggestions.title: Email digest
suggestions.body: Daily summary email at 18:00 AEST: orders today, posts published, audit findings, blog status. Less Telegram noise.

suggestions.title: Cross-store sales attribution
suggestions.body: If a Voyage blog/social post drives a Gifts Hub sale (or vice versa), surface the link. Useful for budget allocation between brands.
